holdings.n: Invesco Short-Term Investments Trust Government & Agency Portfolio Institutional Class

overview.description: The Invesco BulletShares 2029 Corporate Bond ETF (BSCT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated corporate investment-grade bonds with effective maturities in 2029. BSCT was launched on Sep 12, 2019 and is issued by Invesco.
